ddl.value:
(
          "node_type" = 'asset'
          and "asset_id" is not null
          and "folder_id" is null
        )
        or
        (
          "node_type" = 'folder'
          and "folder_id" is not null
          and "asset_id" is null
        )
ddl.name: collection_nodes_target_matches_node_type_chk

ddl.value: ("position_x" is null and "position_y" is null) or ("position_x" is not null and "position_y" is not null and "position_x" >= 0 and "position_y" >= 0)
ddl.name: collection_nodes_position_pair_chk

ddl.value: ("position_x" is null and "position_y" is null) or ("position_x" is not null and "position_y" is not null and "position_x" >= 0 and "position_y" >= 0)
ddl.name: uploads_position_pair_chk
